basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online For Database Specialist / Database Administrator Post
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Database Specialist / Database Administrator Notification 2026 has been released on 21-05-2026 on the official website of IIT Madras. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Database Specialist / Database Administrator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc (Computer Science) or an equivalent postgraduate degree
qualification.details: Database Specialist/ Database Administrator: B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc (Computer Science) or an equivalent postgraduate degree with 2 to 4 years of relevant database administration experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month (Based on experience)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on online application Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Database Specialist / Database Administrator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
